q: What ages are Lernzeit flashcards for?
a: Our range covers ages 1–12. Every product page shows a clear age band, and the Learning Goal Picker above can match a set to your child in under a minute. When in doubt, choose the younger band — confidence first, challenge second.

q: How much time do I need as a parent?
a: Five to ten minutes. Every card carries a prompt on the back that tells you exactly what to ask, so there is zero preparation. Many families keep a set in the car or by the dinner table and use spare moments.

q: Where can I buy Lernzeit products?
a: All our products are sold exclusively on Amazon, with Prime delivery and Amazon's standard returns. Every 'Buy on Amazon' button on this site takes you straight to the official Lernzeit listing.

q: Are the cards durable enough for toddlers?
a: Yes — cards for ages 1–4 are printed on extra-thick board with rounded corners and a wipe-clean laminate. They are designed to survive juice, jam, backpacks and the occasional chew.

q: Do you offer discounts for schools or bulk orders?
a: We do. Schools, nurseries, tuition centres and corporate gifting teams can write to us using the bulk enquiry form above — we'll reply within two working days with options.

q: What if a set doesn't suit my child?
a: Purchases are covered by Amazon's return policy, no questions asked. And if you tell us why it didn't fit, we read every message — customer feedback has shaped every product we've made.
